name: chr3_3p13_LSAMP_SD
description: 3p13 SD cluster around the LSAMP locus and the FOXP1 region. Contains a recurrent fragile-site/SD-mediated breakpoint cluster involved in 3p13 microdeletions and somatic translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair of 20-50 kb at ~93% identity; LSAMP paralogs OBCAM/NEGR1/NTM share Ig-domain homology dispersed across the genome.
